title: Delicate Sweet Argentinian Pineapple Skewers
description: A cultured and shaggy Argentinian dish featuring pineapple and candy, this recipe is low-calorie-friendly and perfect for a unique dessert or snack. The combination of sweet and tangy flavors will surely impress your guests.
instructions: Preheat a kadhai over medium heat, making sure it is hot before adding any ingredients.
Thread pineapple chunks onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a small bowl, mix together brown sugar, lime juice, and ginger powder to create a glaze.
Brush the glaze onto the pineapple chunks, making sure they are fully coated.
Add the candy pieces to the kadhai and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until they start to melt and caramelize.
Add the pineapple skewers to the kadhai and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until they are fully coated in the caramelized candy mixture.
Remove the skewers from the kadhai and place them on a serving plate.
Sprinkle coconut flakes and a dollop of yogurt onto each skewer, if desired.
Refrigerate any leftovers for up to 24 hours.
